# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public/private subnets across multiple AZs, IGW, and NAT Gateways for microservices architecture. VPC Flow Logs intentionally omitted for cost reduction.

Parameters:
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: startup-microservices
    Description: Prefix for resource names/tags
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/20
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.16.0/20
  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.32.0/20
  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.48.0/20
  PrivateDbSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.64.0/20
  PrivateDbSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.80.0/20
  EnableNatGatewayPerAz:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: If true, creates one NAT Gateway per AZ. If false, creates a single NAT Gateway in PublicSubnet1.
  CreateDbNatRoutes:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: If true, DB subnets get default route to NAT (not recommended for many DBs). If false, DB subnets have no default internet route.

Conditions:
  NatPerAz: !Equals [!Ref EnableNatGatewayPerAz, 'true']
  NatSingle: !Equals [!Ref EnableNatGatewayPerAz, 'false']
  DbNatEnabled: !Equals [!Ref CreateDbNatRoutes, 'true']

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-vpc'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-igw'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-public-a'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-public-b'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-app-private-a'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-app-private-b'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PrivateDbSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-db-private-a'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-db
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PrivateDbSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-db-private-b'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-db
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-rt-public'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEip1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-eip-a'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-a'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  NatEip2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Condition: NatPerAz
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-eip-b'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Condition: NatPerAz
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-b'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  AppPrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-rt-app-private-a'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  AppPrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-rt-app-private-b'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  AppPrivateDefaultRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref AppPrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  AppPrivateDefaultRoute2PerAz:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: NatPerAz
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref AppPrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  AppPrivateDefaultRoute2SingleNat:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: NatSingle
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref AppPrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref AppPrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref AppPrivateRouteTable2

  DbPrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-rt-db-private-a'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  DbPrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-rt-db-private-b'
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName

  DbPrivateDefaultRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: DbNatEnabled
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref DbPrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  DbPrivateDefaultRoute2PerAz:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: NatPerAz
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref DbPrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  DbPrivateDefaultRoute2SingleNat:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: NatSingle
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref DbPrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  DbPrivateDefaultRoute2Guard:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::WaitConditionHandle
    Condition: DbNatEnabled

  PrivateDbSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref DbPrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateDbSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref DbPrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated public subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateAppSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated private app subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateAppSubnet1, !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnetIds'

  PrivateDbSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated private DB subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateDbSubnet1, !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDbSubnetIds'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

  NatGatewayIdA:
    Description: NAT Gateway ID in AZ A (or the single NAT if configured)
    Value: !Ref NatGateway1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIdA'

  NatGatewayIdB:
    Condition: NatPerAz
    Description: NAT Gateway ID in AZ B (only when NAT per AZ enabled)
    Value: !Ref NatGateway2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIdB'
